name: Wander
description: Wander shows you what's nearby — landmarks, parks, museums, restaurants, and hidden gems — ranked by how close they are. Tap anything to get Wikipedia context and walking directions, all on your G2 glasses without touching your phone.
author: Steven Lao

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Fetch nearby points of interest and Wikipedia summaries from the Wander API. Also connects to the optional APPS Bridge Android app at 127.0.0.1 (loopback only, never leaves the device) as a GPS fallback if device location isn't available to the WebView.

permissions.name: location
permissions.desc: Find points of interest near your current location
